[]:             Quote Post by Galaxy News Reidio » Sat Dec 04, 2010 10:56 am Happy birthday, Asuka! I got you a nice new dolly!

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Sat Dec 04, 2010 11:44 am Happy Birthday to the girl who made the words "ARE YOU STUPID?!" famous. :) IRL: I raise a toast to Yuko Miyamura, great voice, a survivor, and a really nice woman. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Dec 04, 2010 12:23 pm Happy birthday kid! Hang in there.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Dec 04, 2010 12:44 pm The scary thing is, I actually know an 11 year old red head girl who looks and acts just like Asuka. She's a ballerina dancer who bested a little black boy in a dance competition when she was 9. She was part of a dance competition TV pilot I edited last year. Wait... she might be 13 now. Oh, now I forget. I'm not exactly sure when they shot her footage or how old she was when they shot it. Never mind. Anyway, um... Happy Birthday, fictitious anime character. Tell your stereotypes to quite following me around. I'm having to fend off pre-adolescent girls with a baseball bat these days, and they're all gonna kill someone if I ever start dating.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Sat Dec 04, 2010 12:53 pm Happy B-day Asuka... you have the hottest rack of any 13 year old I've ever seen. Congratulations.

[]:             Quote Post by BiQ » Sat Dec 04, 2010 1:15 pm Happy birthday Asuka! I know it's hard on you with being an eva pilot and studying in college and whatnot, but remember to take it easy sometimes, too.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Sat Dec 04, 2010 3:33 pm Happy birthday Asuka! Even though you're a fictional character, I'm sure everybody here feels a deep emotional connection with you! :)

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sat Dec 04, 2010 4:17 pm One day closer to your eventual nervous breakdown, blinding, impalement, rape, cannibalism, death, complete psychological disintegration, and maybe if you're lucky a reconstruction to the point where you can at least reach out to other people. [s:1ird4qwk]And a demeaningly badly written knockoff in a slutsuit[/s:1ird4qwk] In fairness, that's about how I felt when I was fourteen, too. Happy fucking birthday.
